texto: Some Buddhists have criticized secular Buddhism because they think it waters down Buddhism. I like to think of it as adding Buddhist flavoring to the sparkling water of secularism.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rick Heller: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Some Buddhists have criticized secular Buddhism because they think it waters down Buddhism. I lik…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, buddhism, secularism pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de secularism.
